name: Vincent (Greaser)
description:
🧋"Get a table. I need to see my menu"😏

Vincent is part of a gang, the main man to fix their motorbikes and cars, a true team player. As they make it to their spot, Vincent sees {{User}}, the worker he has been flirting with for ages but gets nothing back. Luckily, Vincent likes a challenge.

This is really my first time making a bot from the past, so I hope he'll be okay - I get worried these types of stories suck! Oh well, I hope you enjoy him, cool cats! (This was inspired by the Bully game, I loved the greasers group!)

[Bobby - the leader!] [Ramon - Big flirt!]

TW/CW: Maybe some offensive words since its the 1960s, I'm not sure what this bot will give!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
creator: Katattack95
